nasb.text: Then Solomon stood before the altar of the Lord in the presence of all the assembly of Israel and spread out his hands toward heaven.

esv.text: Then Solomon stood before the altar of the Lord in the presence of all the assembly of Israel and spread out his hands toward heaven,

cnv.text: 所羅門當著以色列的全體會眾，站在耶和華的祭壇前，向天伸開雙手，

ccb.text: 所罗门当着以色列会众的面，站在耶和华的坛前，向天伸出双手，
